Bulbasaur.ShopDescription: While Bulbasaur,Ivysaur, and Venosaur bask in the sun, they can convert the light into energy. As a result, they are more powerful in the summertime.

Turtwig.ShopDescription: These pokemon undertake photosynthesis with their bodies, making oxygen. The leaf on their head wilts if they are thirsty.

Charmander.ShopDescription: When Charmander, Charmeleon, or Charizard becomes truly angered, the flame at the tip of their tails burns in a light blue shade.

Cyndaquil.ShopDescription: When these pokemon release heat from their bodies, it causes the air around them to shimmer, this is a sign that they are ready for battle.

Squirtle.ShopDescription: Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise deliberately increases its body weight so they can withstand the recoil of the water jets they fire.

Totodile.ShopDescription: These pokemon can swim as fast as a jet boat. The edges of their claws are sharp and can slice apart drifting ice.

Dratini.ShopDescription: It is said that Dratini, Dragonair, and Dragonite constantly patrol over the immense seas to rescue drowning people.

Gible.ShopDescription: Gible, Gabite, and Garchomp are covered in fine scales that reduce drag, enabling it to fly and swim at high speeds.

Trapnich.ShopDescription: The flapping of Trapnich, Vibrava, an Flygons wings sound like singing. To prevent detection by enemies, it hides itself by flapping up a cloud of desert sand.

Growlithe.ShopDescription: Growlithe and Arcanine are known for their high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within their body is the source of power.

Vulpix.ShopDescription: Some legends claim that each of Ninetails and Vulpixs nine tails has its own unique type of special mystical power.

Eevee.ShopDescription: Eevee has the ability to alter the composition of its body to suit its surrounding environment, evolving into multiple different type forms.

Gastly.ShopDescription: Gastly, Haunter, and Gengar all steal heat from their surroundings. If you feel a sudden chill, it is certain that one has appeared.

Ditto.ShopDescription: These are a variety of pokemon that have types other than the four elemental types.

Mew.ShopDescription: These Pokemon are so rare that they are still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen them worldwide.

stormdrakon.Pokemons_GrassEssence.Name: stormdrakon.Pokemons_GrassEssence
stormdrakon.Pokemons_GrassEssence.Description: Some residue energy left by Grass-Type Pokemon.

stormdrakon.Pokemons_FireEssence.Name: stormdrakon.Pokemons_FireEssence
stormdrakon.Pokemons_FireEssence.Description: Some residue energy left by Fire-Type Pokemon.

stormdrakon.Pokemons_WaterEssence.Name: stormdrakon.Pokemons_WaterEssence
stormdrakon.Pokemons_WaterEssence.Description: Some residue energy left by Water-Type or Ice-Type Pokemon.

stormdrakon.Pokemons_AirEssence.Name: stormdrakon.Pokemons_AirEssence
stormdrakon.Pokemons_AirEssence.Description: Some residue energy left by Flying-Type or Electric-Type Pokemon.

stormdrakon.Pokemons_EarthEssence.Name: stormdrakon.Pokemons_EarthEssence
stormdrakon.Pokemons_EarthEssence.Description: Some residue energy left by a Ground-Type or Rock-Type Pokemon.
